instructions: नीचे दिए गए Hindi sentences को English में translate करें। 'Would Like To' के सभी forms — positive, negative, question — को cover किया गया है।

questions.hindi: मैं एक गिलास पानी पीना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to have a glass of water.
alternatives: I'd like to have a glass of water.
questions.hint: I + would like to + base verb
questions.explanation: 'Would like to' = polite 'want to'. Contraction 'I'd' is equally correct.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वह manager से मिलना चाहेगी।
questions.english: She would like to meet the manager.
alternatives: She'd like to meet the manager.
questions.explanation: सभी subjects के साथ would like to — She/He/It के लिए भी 'would' नहीं बदलता।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप कॉफ़ी पीना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to have a coffee?
alternatives: Would you like a coffee?
questions.hint: Would + you + like to + base verb
questions.explanation: Question form: Would को subject (you) से पहले रखें।
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं इस नौकरी के लिए apply करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to apply for this job.
alternatives: I'd like to apply for this job.
questions.hint: I + would like to + apply for
questions.explanation: 'Apply for' = job/position के लिए अनुरोध करना।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: हम आपके साथ काम करना नहीं चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would not like to work with you.
alternatives: We wouldn't like to work with you.
questions.hint: We + would not like to + base verb
questions.explanation: Negative: would not like to या wouldn't like to।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या वह यह presentation देना चाहेगा?
questions.english: Would he like to give this presentation?
alternatives: Would he like to present?
questions.explanation: Question form में would पहले आता है।
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं आपसे माफी माँगना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to apologize to you.
alternatives: I'd like to apologize.
questions.explanation: Professional context में 'apologize' use करें, सिर्फ 'sorry' नहीं।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वे अगले हफ्ते यात्रा करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: They would like to travel next week.
alternatives: They'd like to travel next week.
questions.explanation: Future plans के लिए would like to का use।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं इस meeting में एक बात add करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to add a point in this meeting.
alternatives: I'd like to add something to this meeting.
questions.explanation: Office meetings में politely बात करने के लिए।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप menu देखना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to see the menu?
alternatives: Would you like to look at the menu?
questions.explanation: Restaurant और customer service में यह phrase बहुत common है।
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: वह अपनी salary के बारे में बात करना नहीं चाहेगी।
questions.english: She would not like to discuss her salary.
alternatives: She wouldn't like to discuss her salary.
questions.explanation: Negative में 'wouldn't' contraction use कर सकते हैं।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + wouldn't like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं आपको धन्यवाद कहना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to thank you.
alternatives: I'd like to express my gratitude.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: हम एक नया branch खोलना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to open a new branch.
alternatives: We'd like to open a new branch.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या तुम मेरे साथ lunch लेना चाहोगे?
questions.english: Would you like to have lunch with me?
alternatives: Would you like to join me for lunch?
questions.hint: Would you like to + have lunch
questions.explanation: Social invitation में would like to।
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: वह इस project पर काम नहीं करना चाहेगा।
questions.english: He would not like to work on this project.
alternatives: He wouldn't like to work on this project.
questions.explanation: Negative form में 'not' would और like के बीच आता है।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं इस company में grow करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to grow in this company.
alternatives: I'd like to grow professionally in this company.
questions.explanation: Interview में career growth बताने के लिए।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप कुछ और बताना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to add anything else?
alternatives: Would you like to say anything more?
questions.explanation: Meetings में दूसरों को invite करने के लिए।
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: हम आपको यह सेवा offer करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to offer you this service.
alternatives: We'd like to offer you our service.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं खुद को इस role के लिए suitable मानता हूँ और यहाँ join करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I believe I am suitable for this role and would like to join your team.
alternatives: I'd like to join your organization as I feel I am the right fit.
questions.explanation: Interview में confidence के साथ interest दिखाने के लिए।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप पानी लेना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to have some water?
alternatives: Would you like some water?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं इस मामले को जल्दी हल करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to resolve this matter quickly.
alternatives: I'd like to sort this out quickly.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वे इस समझौते पर हस्ताक्षर नहीं करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: They would not like to sign this agreement.
alternatives: They wouldn't like to sign the agreement.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या वह interview के लिए आना चाहेगी?
questions.english: Would she like to come for the interview?
alternatives: Would she like to attend the interview?
questions.explanation: Third person question form — would + she।
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं नई skills सीखना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to learn new skills.
alternatives: I'd like to acquire new skills.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: हम आपकी शिकायत सुनना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to hear your complaint.
alternatives: We'd like to listen to your concern.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं अपनी performance review के बारे में बात करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to discuss my performance review.
alternatives: I'd like to talk about my performance evaluation.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप हमारी नई product देखना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to see our new product?
alternatives: Would you like to have a look at our new product?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: वह इस job में interest नहीं लेना चाहेगा।
questions.english: He would not like to take interest in this job.
alternatives: He wouldn't like to pursue this job.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं आपको अपने अनुभव के बारे में बताना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to tell you about my experience.
alternatives: I'd like to share my experience with you.
questions.explanation: Interview में experience बताने के लिए।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: हम आपसे personally मिलना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to meet you in person.
alternatives: We'd like to meet you personally.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप यहाँ बैठना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to sit here?
alternatives: Would you like to take a seat here?
questions.explanation: Hospitality में guest को invite करना।
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं अपना परिचय देना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to introduce myself.
alternatives: I'd like to briefly introduce myself.
questions.explanation: Meeting/interview शुरू करने का classic phrase।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वह देर तक काम नहीं करना चाहेगी।
questions.english: She would not like to work overtime.
alternatives: She wouldn't like to stay late.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या वे हमारे साथ dinner करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would they like to have dinner with us?
alternatives: Would they like to join us for dinner?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं आपकी company में contribute करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to contribute to your company.
alternatives: I'd like to add value to your organization.
questions.explanation: Interview में value addition show करना।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: हम इस deal को finalize करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to finalize this deal.
alternatives: We'd like to close this deal.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप अपनी problem share करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to share your problem?
alternatives: Would you like to tell me what's wrong?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं इस topic पर एक presentation देना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to give a presentation on this topic.
alternatives: I'd like to present on this topic.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वह इस offer को accept नहीं करना चाहेगा।
questions.english: He would not like to accept this offer.
alternatives: He wouldn't like to accept the offer.
questions.explanation: Negative form of accepting an offer।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं घर से काम करना prefer करूँगा।
questions.english: I would prefer to work from home.
alternatives: I'd prefer working from home.
questions.explanation: 'Would prefer to' = stronger choice than 'would like to'।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would prefer to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप हमारे office का tour लेना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to take a tour of our office?
alternatives: Would you like to have a look around our office?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: हम अपने clients को best service देना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to provide the best service to our clients.
alternatives: We'd like to offer top-quality service to our clients.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं इस course में enroll करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to enroll in this course.
alternatives: I'd like to register for this course.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वे इस project को cancel नहीं करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: They would not like to cancel this project.
alternatives: They wouldn't like to cancel the project.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप इस position के लिए interview देना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to interview for this position?
alternatives: Would you like to apply for this position?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं एक savings account खोलना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to open a savings account.
alternatives: I'd like to open a bank account.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वह team के साथ collaborate करना चाहेगी।
questions.english: She would like to collaborate with the team.
alternatives: She'd like to work together with the team.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं यह opportunity नहीं खोना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would not like to miss this opportunity.
alternatives: I wouldn't like to lose this chance.
questions.explanation: Expressing that something is important to keep।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या वह नई city में shift होना चाहेगा?
questions.english: Would he like to move to a new city?
alternatives: Would he like to relocate?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: हम आपको यह position offer करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to offer you this position.
alternatives: We'd like to offer you the job.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं अपने boss को अपना idea बताना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to share my idea with my boss.
alternatives: I'd like to present my idea to my boss.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या तुम yoga class join करना चाहोगे?
questions.english: Would you like to join the yoga class?
alternatives: Would you like to sign up for yoga?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: वे इस issue को publicly discuss नहीं करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: They would not like to discuss this issue publicly.
alternatives: They wouldn't like this issue discussed in public.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं आपको हमारी नई service के बारे में inform करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to inform you about our new service.
alternatives: I'd like to let you know about our new service.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप अपनी profile update करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to update your profile?
alternatives: Would you like to edit your profile?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: वह नई city में खुद को prove करना चाहेगी।
questions.english: She would like to prove herself in the new city.
alternatives: She'd like to show her abilities in the new city.
questions.hint: prove yourself = खुद को साबित करना
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं अपने घर के पास एक gym खोलना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to open a gym near my home.
alternatives: I'd like to start a gym close to my house.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप हमारी feedback form fill करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to fill in our feedback form?
alternatives: Would you like to complete our feedback form?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: हम deadline से पहले project finish करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to finish the project before the deadline.
alternatives: We'd like to complete the project ahead of schedule.
questions.hint: before the deadline = समय से पहले
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं अपनी English communication improve करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to improve my English communication.
alternatives: I'd like to enhance my English skills.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप अपना order place करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to place your order?
alternatives: Would you like to order now?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: वह अपनी team को recognize करना चाहेगा।
questions.english: He would like to recognize his team's efforts.
alternatives: He'd like to appreciate his team.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं इस बारे में किसी expert से बात करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to speak to an expert about this.
alternatives: I'd like to consult an expert on this matter.
questions.hint: speak to an expert = विशेषज्ञ से बात करना
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप हमारे नए program में participate करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to participate in our new program?
alternatives: Would you like to take part in our new program?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: हम आपको एक extra day की छुट्टी देना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to give you an extra day off.
alternatives: We'd like to offer you an additional day of leave.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं अपने career में आगे बढ़ना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to advance in my career.
alternatives: I'd like to move forward in my career.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वे इस conference में attend नहीं करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: They would not like to attend this conference.
alternatives: They wouldn't like to go to this conference.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप हमारे hotel में room upgrade लेना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to upgrade your room in our hotel?
alternatives: Would you like a room upgrade?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं इस project में lead role लेना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to take a lead role in this project.
alternatives: I'd like to lead this project.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वह अपने mistake से सीखना चाहेगी।
questions.english: She would like to learn from her mistakes.
alternatives: She'd like to grow through her mistakes.
questions.hint: learn from mistakes = गलतियों से सीखना
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: हम एक नई marketing strategy try करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to try a new marketing strategy.
alternatives: We'd like to implement a new marketing approach.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप पहले यहाँ काम कर चुके हैं और फिर से join करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to rejoin after having worked here before?
alternatives: Would you like to come back to this company?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं आपकी बात मानना नहीं चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would not like to agree with you on this.
alternatives: I wouldn't like to go along with this.
questions.explanation: Polite disagreement — much softer than 'I don't agree'।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या वह अपनी पसंदीदा city में relocate करना चाहेगा?
questions.english: Would he like to relocate to his favourite city?
alternatives: Would he like to move to his preferred city?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं अपनी team को motivate करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to motivate my team.
alternatives: I'd like to inspire my team.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वह public speaking से डरती है और बोलना नहीं चाहेगी।
questions.english: She is afraid of public speaking and would not like to speak.
alternatives: She wouldn't like to speak in public.
questions.explanation: Combining personal feeling with negative preference।
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would not like to + base verb

questions.hindi: हम आपसे personally मिलकर बात करना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: We would like to speak with you in person.
alternatives: We'd like to meet you face to face.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या आप कोई complaint दर्ज करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would you like to file a complaint?
alternatives: Would you like to register a complaint?
questions.hint: file a complaint = शिकायत दर्ज करना
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं अपनी strengths और weaknesses के बारे में बताना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to talk about my strengths and weaknesses.
alternatives: I'd like to share my strengths and areas for improvement.
questions.hint: strengths and weaknesses = ताकत और कमज़ोरियाँ
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: वे अपना business दूसरे देशों में फैलाना चाहेंगे।
questions.english: They would like to expand their business to other countries.
alternatives: They'd like to take their business international.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: मैं आपके साथ एक छोटी सी meeting schedule करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to schedule a brief meeting with you.
alternatives: I'd like to set up a short meeting with you.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb

questions.hindi: क्या वे हमारी event में participate करना चाहेंगे?
questions.english: Would they like to participate in our event?
alternatives: Would they like to take part in our event?
questions.grammarRule: Would + subject + like to + base verb?

questions.hindi: मैं किसी NGO के लिए volunteer work करना चाहूँगा।
questions.english: I would like to do volunteer work for an NGO.
alternatives: I'd like to volunteer for a non-profit organization.
questions.grammarRule: Subject + would like to + base verb
